problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: If Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
